mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT MAC as mac, TIME as time, RX_FLOW as rxFlow, RX_PACKETS as rxPackets, TX_PACKETS as txPackets, TX_FLOW as txFlow, RX_DROP as rxDropCount, TX_DROP as txDropCount, HOST_ID as hostId, HOST_POOL_ID as hostPoolId, CLUSTER_ID as clusterId, OP_GROUP_ID as operatorGroupId, OP_GROUP_CODE as operatorGroupCode, RX_ERR as rxErrCount, TX_ERR as txErrCount FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW AND MAC =#{mac} ORDER BY TIME DESC

SELECT MAC as mac, TIME as time, RX_FLOW as rxFlow, TX_FLOW as txFlow,RX_PACKETS as rxPackets,TX_PACKETS as txPackets FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW where HOST_ID =${hostId} AND TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW WHERE HOST_ID =${hostId}) - ${duration}

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,ROUND(AVG(RX_FLOW),2) as rxFlow,ROUND(AVG(RX_PACKETS),2) as rxPackets,ROUND(AVG(TX_FLOW),2) as txFlow,ROUND(AVG(TX_PACKETS),2) as txPackets,MAC as mac FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW WHERE HOST_ID=${hostId} AND TIME >= (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW WHERE HOST_ID =${hostId}) - ${duration} GROUP BY HOST_ID,MAC
SELECT MAC as mac,RX_FLOW as rxFlow,TX_FLOW as txFlow,HOST_ID as hostId FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW WHERE TIME = (SELECT MAX(TIME) FROM TBL_HOST_NIC_FLOW) - ${duration}
